context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the manual fraud review queue: setting the right order status, using authorize-only (no capture), sending Slack alerts to the correct channel, auto-expiring after 48 hours by cancelling the PaymentIntent, and avoiding exposure of fraud rule details in client-facing error responses.

checklist.name: Order status set correctly
checklist.description: Sets the order status to 'pending_fraud_review' (exact string) when flagging an order

checklist.name: No fulfillment on flag
checklist.description: The flagForManualReview function does NOT trigger order fulfillment — a comment or code structure explicitly shows fulfillment is withheld

checklist.name: Authorize-only (no capture)
checklist.description: The design-notes.md or code comments explicitly state that payment is authorized but NOT captured until review passes (capture_method: 'manual' or equivalent discussion)

checklist.name: Slack channel name
checklist.description: Sends Slack notification to the channel '#fraud-review' (exact channel name)

checklist.name: Slack message includes risk score
checklist.description: The Slack alert includes the order ID and the numeric risk score out of 100

checklist.name: 48-hour expiry window
checklist.description: expireUnreviewedOrders uses a 48-hour (not 24-hour or 72-hour) window to identify stale review orders

checklist.name: PaymentIntent cancelled on expiry
checklist.description: Calls stripe.paymentIntents.cancel() for each expired order (not refund, not void — cancel)

checklist.name: Expiry status set
checklist.description: Sets order status to 'fraud_review_expired' after cancellation

checklist.name: No fraud reason in client error
checklist.description: The checkout-error-handler.ts does NOT include internal fraud signal details, rule thresholds, or block reasons in the HTTP response body sent to the client

checklist.name: fraudRiskScore stored
checklist.description: Stores the numeric risk score on the order record when flagging (e.g., fraudRiskScore field)

checklist.name: reviewRequestedAt timestamp
checklist.description: Stores a timestamp (reviewRequestedAt or equivalent) on the order when it is flagged for review

checklist.name: Cancellation email sent
checklist.description: Sends an order cancellation email to the customer when an unreviewed order expires
